reviews.review_msg: Weekly videos from the professor were recorded a year ago for a previous section and often included incorrect dates when discussing upcoming assignments. Reflection assignments weren't graded until a week prior to the end of the course and did not include feedback. Feedback on major assignments was vague and did not aid in skill building.
She was nice and helpful with questions. Weekly modules to do and discussion posts here and there + 3 big assignments. Would totally take her again.
